transcript: Speaker A: माझ्या शेजारी एक मुलगा HR शी फोनवर बोलतोय. HR ने त्याला त्याचं वय विचारलं तर तो म्हणाला "I have 22 years". त्याला कसं सांगू की त्याचं व्याकरण चुकतंय? [A boy next to me is talking to HR on the phone. When HR asked him his age, he said "I have 22 years". How do I tell him his grammar is wrong?] Speaker B: त्याला सांग, जेव्हा कोणी तुमची age विचारतं तेव्हा "I am 22 years old" असं म्हणतात. कारण "have" वस्तूंसाठी वापरतात. उदाहरणार्थ, "I have a car". Age सांगताना "I am" वापरतात. [Tell him, when someone asks your age, they say "I am 22 years old". Because "have" is used for things. For example, "I have a car". When telling age, "I am" is used.] Speaker A: Excuse me, "I am 22 years old" असं म्हणा, "I have 22 years" असं नाही. [Excuse me, say "I am 22 years old", not "I have 22 years".] Speaker C: ओहो, ओके ओके. पण तुम्ही हे कोणाला विचारत होतात? [Oh, okay okay. But who were you asking this?] Speaker A: MySivi AI ला. यावर एक कोटी लोक इंग्लिश शिकतात. [MySivi AI. Over 1 crore people learn English on this.] Speaker C: एक कोटी? पण महाग असेल ना? [1 crore? But it must be expensive, right?] Speaker A: छे छे, एक रुपयात ट्रायल घेऊ शकतोस. [No no, you can take a trial for 1 rupee.] Speaker C: पण माझ्याकडे जास्त वेळ नसतो. [But I don't have much time.] Speaker A: रोज फक्त १०-१५ मिनिटं प्रॅक्टिस सुरू केली ना तरी पुरेसं आहे. [Even starting with just 10-15 minutes of practice daily is enough.] Speaker C: मग कसं जॉईन करायचं? [Then how to join?] Speaker A: हे बघ, हे इन्स्टॉलचं बटन दिसतंय, ते दाब आणि आत्ताच इंग्लिश सुरू कर. [Look, see this install button, press it and start English right now.]
on_screen_text: माझ्या शेजारी [My neighbor] एक मुलगा HR शी [A boy with HR] "I am 22 years old" असं म्हणतात ["I am 22 years old" is what they say] कारण "have" वस्तूंसाठी [Because "have" is for things] Age सांगताना [When telling age] "I am" वापरतात [They use "I am"] "It's I am 22 years old." "I have 22 years" असं नाही [It's "I am 22 years old." Not "I have 22 years"] ओक्के. ओक्के. [Okay. Okay.] MySivi AI ला [To MySivi AI] पण महाग असेल ना? [But it must be expensive, right?] रोज फक्त 10-15 [Daily just 10-15] मग कसं Join करायचं? [Then how to join?]
summary: A woman uses the MySivi AI app to correct a man's incorrect English grammar during a phone call. She explains that the app is used by over 10 million people, offers a 1-rupee trial, and requires only 10-15 minutes of daily practice. The ad ends with a call to action to install the app.
